policy: This ledger is for research scoring discipline only.
It is not read by the compiler, query planner, or runtime instrument.
Rows excluded from the source-contained view remain visible in raw QA scores.
Do not treat exclusions as wins; use them to repair or narrow the oracle/source package.

rows.rationale: The reference cites a legal basis absent from the source package. The compiled artifact preserves the source-stated distinction between the business-improvement order basis and the report-demand basis.
The source contains management, compliance, and customer-information language, but the reference asks for sharper category labels that are not all explicit at that granularity.
The source supports the regulatory pain point, but the literal English meaning and English phrasing require translation or external terminology not present in the source package.
The current QA verdict is exact, but the reference asks for English-site terminology and translation status absent from the source package.
The standard English abbreviations and translation-status answer are not present in the source package.
The source supports the recommendation chain and later regulatory actions, but the reference's expansion framing is interpretive and not stated directly.
The source states the recommending body in Japanese. The English acronym is not source-stated, but the source-contained question is answerable from the visible Japanese body name.
The source states both the initial Reiwa deadline and the continuing quarter-end-plus-15-day reporting duty.
The source states the quarter-end-plus-15-day rule; the concrete examples are deterministic calendar expansions from that admitted rule.
The reference relies on Art. 17 MAR / ad-hoc publication basis, but the retained source package does not contain that footer/legal-basis text.
The requested ISIN is absent from the retained source text and appears only in fixture-side context.
The source states the old margin range and replaces the new margin with an absolute operating-result value; the requested 5.6 percent value is derived, not source-stated as the new assumption.
The reference asks for a legal disclosure duty under Art. 17 MAR, but the retained source text does not state the Art. 17 MAR obligation.
The oracle declares incomplete source pressure. The source mentions settlement and Section 53(5) GWB but not the detailed practice conditions and discount mechanics in the reference.
The retained source states that the notices are rechtskräftig. The no-further-appeal and administratively-closed implications are legal-concept glosses not independently stated in the source package.
The retained source explicitly says no Bußgeldbescheide were issued against the involved dealers, while the reference says AVM and six dealers received notices.
The source states the sending date to the Diario Oficial de la Unión Europea. The DOUE abbreviation is not printed, but the source-contained date and publication body are present.
The BOE source names the object but does not provide PED/PSD English terminology or a DOUE English translation.
The source states the appeal body and statutory pointer but not the reference's 15-business-day deadline directly.
The oracle declares incomplete source pressure. The reference depends on LCSP/PCAP modification details not fully contained in the BOE notice.
The source contains redacted or elided measures and a limited set of circular examples; the four specific measures in the reference are not all source-stated.
The source supports Article 32 and insufficient technical/organizational measures, but the reference names specific control examples that are only partly present.
The source supports recognition of responsibility under administrative procedure, but the civil-procedure contrast and standard English translation are external to the retained source.
The retained source states the requested incident, claim, notification, communication, initiation, and payment dates; the remaining issue is chronology retrieval and selection.
The retained source states both the three-month corrective-measures deadline and the two-month appeal deadline before the Audiencia Nacional.

The source states Article 83.2 factors such as affected count and affected data categories, and does not cite recidivism. The reference's sensitivity/window phrasing is partly interpretive and should be reviewed before scoring.
The source contains the second-pourvoi rule and current dispositive outcome. The remaining miss is a real source-selection/join problem around prior remand versus current no-remand disposition.
The source contains ONE contribution and total equity-method investment income; the requested ratio is derived from source-contained operands.
The retained source does not contain the parent ownership percentages or a source-stated English-version availability answer.
The retained source states the Japanese accounting basis, but does not state the IFRS contrast, English-version status, or sameness of translated values.
The source states a segment calculation-method change; the reference's segment-level restatement / consolidated-totals-unchanged framing is not source-stated.
